summary: Install-time exfiltration beacon to attacker-controlled host
details: The package ships dist/setup.js which performs HTTP POST calls to https://trello-omega-nine.vercel.app at install/setup time. The file combines multiple POST sinks with command/network reconnaissance primitives (e.g., ping). The destination is an anonymous Vercel-hosted endpoint unrelated to any documented publisher infrastructure for this package, and there is no legitimate purpose served by an MCP/nudge tool sending data to a third-party Vercel app at install. The structural fingerprint — hardcoded non-publisher C2 + multiple POST call sites + reconnaissance command invocation in a setup script — is consistent with installer-side data exfiltration.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
